title: HAPANA ANOZIVA SOMEONE
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: HAPANA ANOZIVA SOMEONE (No One Knows Someone)

verses.text: Toti uri kupota uchinetsana ne mumwe munhu, aai unoti kana ukada kumu rova ari kumhanya kuna mukoma, iye mukoma wake ari kubva apindira woku rova stereki.
Handiti Uno tsvaga nzira yekumu pesanisa ne mukoma.
Unogona kuto tuma vanhu kuti endai muno muudza kuti mukoma ahabatsire uye atori muroyi.
Obva wavati , kana akaku vhunzai kuti saka ano batsira ndiani momupa phone number ya Micheal Jackson. Akati haisi kudairwa moti uno ramba uchiedza ichadairwa.
Iye munhu wacho kana akapusa ano tuka mukoma
Dai yai dairwa inga dai yaka dairwa kare
Honai ma CHINA aka fona yavo iri kudairwa
Pfungwa ye mavakiro akadai inobva kuna Mwari
Saka pavanozo uya ku zimbabwe muchiti MBUDZI roundabout yaka penga , vanototi ahh shame
Pamunogara navo pasi kuti mutaure, anenge achitongo kutarisira pasi
Ini ndinoona seisiri mhosva yedu mukanditendera ndoisa maonero moagadzirisa kana akapesana
Sei ndadaro mambo inga makore musangano vaporofiti vachiti zvepasi pano hazvina BASA

Kusvika pachokafu chaicho taidyiswa mhandire nezvinhu zvisina kana nutritional value. Ukadabkungotaura zverugare unoita sewaponda munhu saka vanhu vangazofarira kuvaka izvo sei imi makati kuRENJE ndokwamunosika zivo
Hauti kumunhu ndokuda usati wava kumuda
Unongo regera kumu tengera hembe dze Christmas
Iye anofanira kuona ega ndinenge ndisiri kudiwa
Dambudziko ndere kuti muno simbisana munhamo
Pamuchatanga kugona kuri vhunza nema facts, ndo paricha dzora moyo
Muri kunyeperana pakuti ari pano ari kunyepera vamwe kuti ahhh ini ndakafona number iya ya Micheal Jackson yakadairwa
Pane vari kunyepa kuti MICHEAL JACKSON ndataura naye ati shingirirai
Uri kuti ha ako nekuti hausati wamuona ariko
Plus number yawaka pihwa haisi kuita through
Iwe ita , iyeye akamuona nga aite zva ari kuita
Chi chazoita special pana ABASID kuti amuone ega
Ozo dzoka kwandiri undi manikidza kubvuma zva aona iye
Ini ndikamuona handifanire kumanikidza vanhu kubvuma kuti ariko
And iye ahafanire kundipa basa rekuno udza vamwe kuti ndiriko
Anodi kungono mira mberi kwavo oti ndini
James ozo udza ana sekuru vedu vaivepo
Ana sekuru vedu voudzawo vana vavo
Vana vavo vozo udza isu kuti Mwari ariko
Tovhunza madhara kuti hanzi makaona Mwari ka imi
Ivo voti kwete isu hedu asi ana baba vedu vaka famba na va James
Zvonzi ayewa kwete havo ivo, asi Ginatsio ndiye akabva kuna Mwari
Woti ok saka Ginatsio akaona Mwari zvonzi hongu
Zvonzi akambo fukunura mbeu yanga yavigwa muvhu asipo
But Mwari handisati ndamuwana pa zvose zvamataura
Vanobva vati izwi rakaramba zvi patara
Obva watoziva kuti tadzokera futi paye
But Mwana ari kutorwara ka uyu
Zvonzi enda ku mberengwa kuna madzibaba vanotaura na Someone uya
Someone ati mwana ane mhepo ye mufi
Wobva wati kumbiraiwo Someone wenyu abvise mhepo iyi
Zvonzi Someone ati pa musha penyu panoda choto
Orongawo iweee 3 weeks mwana achirwara akamirira kuti pazoitwa choto
Husiku ihwohwo mumwe ano simuka woti Someone ati tendererai musha uno katatu
Mumwe osimuka woti mangwanani ndiri kuda kutaura ne musha Wese ,
Endai munoudza Sabhuku kuti pana Someone ari kuvada
Ana chiremba voita postmortem zvonzi afa ne malaria
Yaigona kungo rapwa pa clinic yepa growth point
Vanhu vane problem vanhu vanoti Someone ndino muziva
Iye ega asinganzi muporofiti, ahana cha anogona
Akasvika pane vanhu anongonzi ndeip Phidza
Kuti awane cha ano remekedzerwa nacho ne vanhu, akaona kuti ndikava nyepera kuti ndo ziva SOMEONE uya, ndoswera ndava mu GD6
Musoro we nyaya hapana ano ziva SOMEONE
Asi tose tinobvuma kuti kuna SOMEONE
BVUNZO: St PETER , verse rekuti ICHI ndicho chiremba takachitakura paraka imbiswa ne mweya pana Amai Bester ku ENDIDHAI maivepo here
Tine mharidzo dzatirikukoshesa dzinove dzatirikungotaura asi tisingashandise njere madziri
Because ndo vari kunyepa kuti tabva kuna SOMEONE, ma fata eroma ahadaro
Iye zvino mapfekwa ne Mweya wana JOSHUA
Vakazoti kune madhara ah ah imi, hatichada kuramba tichi tenderera
Vakasvikira pakuti kuna MOSES wacho , enough is enough
Ndo pavakaimba kuti ichi 🧠 ndicho chiremba takachi takura
Vakanga vakuti ahhh MWARI ari mumadzoro medu umu
Hungu vaizviita Amai ivavo vari pamweya mutsvene
Havana kuti ti imbe tichi nongedzera misoro yedu here?
Paisa rehwa chiremba ichi 👑 chesimbi Pairehwa ichi 🧠 Ndo chiremba ichi
Ma neurons ano mhanya kubva kutsoka ku kwidza ku chiremba🧠 Chiremba 🧠chobva chati ah ah ma red blood cells nga agadzire Haemoglobin
Hakuna CHIREMBA chino darika Zuva iri 🧠 Ratakadziga
Uyu ☀️ndi RA kudenga Uyu 🧠 ndi RA
Ana RA vaviri ava vanenge vakufamba vese
Nekuti kune zuva ku nyika idzodzo
Kana Mwari ada wumbirwa mumwe mutumbi obuda nepa door rinonzi MAI MARIA opinda munyika ino
Pachinenge chichi fanira kufunga business, chivi chiya chawaita chino svikoti kuna RA 🧠,
Haaa business hari bude iri, handiti taka pomba
Hapana Someone anobva kudenga woku tonga
Pakuzvi tongesa wakutombo dzima Zuva 🧠 iri mauri Ukada kusimuka kuti uparidze,
Apo wanga uine nyaya yakanaka yeku taura
But unozongoti ahhh ndaka uraya ka ini
JESU akaroverwa pa Muchinjiko pa GOROGOTA
Tione kuti GOLGOTHA yacho zvinorevei kuti gorogota
Vakadi kungoti JESUS was crucified in the place of the skull 🧠 Vaka ziva kuti imi mukazviziva , muchaziva kuti jesu ari kufa everyday
Kufa kwa Jesu pa GOROGOTA idi
Asi chaiva chiri chiratidzo chekufa kwa akanga agara achi ita matiri
Dai akange asingafe matiri, na iye aisazofawo pa gorogota
Pamuri kuti jesu acha dzoka, anofanira kutanga adzoka mauri
Ndo paucha mutsa RA ☀️ muhupenyu hwako Ukaramba uchida zvekufa
AYO mazuva akataurwa , na iye MOSES ,
